title: PartyDeco XXL Foil Balloon Moon with Bear, 71 x 86 cm, White - Gold - Light Blue - Blue, 1 Count, Boys
features: Product: XXL crescent moon balloon. Contents: 1 piece. Dimensions after inflation (L x H): 71 x 86 cm. Material: plastic film. Colour: white, gold, light blue. For filling with helium or air, straw included
Versatile use: whether as a hanging decoration, window decoration, decorating the back wall of the party table or as a photo wall background, this foil balloon blends harmoniously into any ambience

IDEAL PARTY DECORATION - Our foil balloon will make every child's party an unforgettable experience. The helium balloon is the perfect element for any balloon decoration and ensures children's bright eyes
MODERN GIANT BALLOON - Thanks to its minimalist yet original design, the helium balloon can be easily used as a birthday balloon, party balloon or great baby room decoration

description: Giant XXL Crescent Moon Balloon Material: plastic, film, size after inflation (L x H): approx. 71 x 86 cm, size before inflation (L x H): approx. 80 x 98 cm, Package includes: 1 x balloon, colour: white, gold, light blue, blue - Large, sturdy and durable, with straw for easy filling - Suitable for filling with helium or for air inflation. This charming crescent moon helium balloon with baby sleeping bear is the perfect decoration for a baby shower or children's birthday. Whether as a hanging decoration, window decoration, decorating the back wall of the party table or as a photo wall background, the foil balloon creates a festive atmosphere and bright eyes for children. But this party balloon not only looks good as a birthday balloon. Our foil balloon is particularly popular as a decoration for baby's room. In addition, the decorative balloon can be easily combined with other baby decorations, birthday decoration, party decoration and balloon decoration. With this helium balloon as a gift, you can delight your loved ones, both children and adults.
